title: lepidium oleraceum
intro: Lepidium oleraceum, also known as cress or garden cress, is a fast-growing annual herb that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and is used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Lepidium oleraceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a garnish or ingredient in salads, adding a peppery flavor and nutritional value.
